mapper.update: UPDATE book_info SET current_stock = current_stock - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND current_stock > 0 AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE book_info SET current_stock = current_stock + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_info b WHERE b.is_deleted = 0
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND (b.category_id = #{categoryId} OR b.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM book_category WHERE parent_id = #{categoryId} AND is_deleted = 0))
AND b.status = #{status}

SELECT b.id, b.isbn, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.publish_date, b.cover_url, b.category_id, bc.category_name, b.description, b.total_stock, b.current_stock, b.status, b.create_time FROM book_info b LEFT JOIN book_category bc ON b.category_id = bc.id AND bc.is_deleted = 0 WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, isbn, title, author, publisher, publish_date, cover_url, category_id, description, total_stock, current_stock, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM book_info WHERE isbn = #{isbn} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, isbn, title, author, publisher, publish_date, cover_url, category_id, description, total_stock, current_stock, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM book_info WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_info (isbn, title, author, publisher, publish_date, cover_url, category_id, description, total_stock, current_stock, status) VALUES (#{isbn}, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{publishDate}, #{coverUrl}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{totalStock}, #{totalStock}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE book_info SET isbn = #{isbn}, title = #{title}, author = #{author}, publisher = #{publisher}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, category_id = #{categoryId}, description = #{description}, total_stock = #{totalStock}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE book_info SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
